title: House 4 Isabel cottage approach — hugs and ask
prompt:
Cast (Halloween night):
- @Sara: 7yo, FAIRY-PRINCESS COSTUME — silver tiara, pink-white ombre tutu w/ crystal bodice, glittery wings, fairy wand + jack-o-lantern bucket. Wavy dark-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Eva: 3yo, PUMPKIN-ONESIE COSTUME — round orange pumpkin body w/ carved jack-o-lantern face on tummy, green leaf-stem hat, tiny pumpkin treat bucket. Curly bright-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Isabel: kid friend in UNICORN COSTUME — pastel rainbow mane hood, white onesie, gold horn.

Multi-shot composition. Continuity from clip 11 closing frame: family stepping softly off the previous porch onto the leaf-strewn path. Now arriving at fairy-lit cottage approach.

Shot 1 (0-4s, medium-wide eye-level, slow dolly push) — Elements: @Sara, @Eva, @Isabel, @ep15_house4_isabel_cottage
@Sara center-left at the foot of the porch step holding candy bucket in left hand and magic-wand in right at chest height. @Eva center-right beside Sara, both hands on her pumpkin bucket. @Isabel softly raised one step above them on the porch, holding her unicorn-shaped candy bucket with both hands. @Sara softly lifts her right hand (still holding wand) in a small 'hi friend' wave. @Isabel softly lifts her right hand off her bucket to do the same little reciprocal wave then returns it. @Eva bounces in place once, beaming. @Sara: "Isabel! Hi! Have you seen our dog Ginger?"

Shot 2 (4-7s, medium-close, cut to) — Elements: @Isabel, @ep15_house4_isabel_cottage
@Isabel softly tilts her head toward the background where her mom stands (Isabel's mom NPC softly soft-blurred behind her on the porch in autumn-orange cardigan with a small black flashlight at her side, kind smile — described in-prompt only). @Isabel softly shakes her head NO with a small kid-show pout, then her face brightens. @Isabel: "I haven't seen her — but Mama says we'll HELP look! Come on!"

Shot 3 (7-10s, medium-wide, slow pull back) — Elements: @Sara, @Eva, @ep15_house4_isabel_cottage
@Sara and @Eva softly tilt their faces up toward the porch with warm hopeful eyes. Isabel-mom NPC voice softly off-screen from the porch background: "Let's all check the side yard, kiddos!" @Eva: "Yay, more helpers!"

Lighting: soft warm twinkling string lights washing the porch.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, kid-show.
negativePrompt: duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same, mirrored figure, second father, two Papa, identical adults, second mother, two Mama, mama visible, papa visible, third child, second sister, second sara, second eva, two eva, duplicate eva, three girls, fourth child, fifth child, additional children, extra child in background, ghost figure, ghost kid, ghost children, shadow children, shadow of person, mirrored children, mirror reflection, family members in the background, strangers, crowd, group of people, other faces, background people, friends, neighbors, extra neighbors, isabel as blonde, isabel with straight hair, isabel as twin of sara, isabel in pink, isabel in tutu, leo visible in this clip, three arms, third arm, extra arm, extra hand, floating hand, anatomy error, scary face, frightening expression, horror lighting, scary monster, real monster, monstrous teeth, fangs, claws, papa angry, papa thundering shout, papa apoplectic, papa rage face, intense yelling, blood, red liquid, red splatter, red stain, gore, injury, scary, violent, distressing, motion lines, action lines, dust trails, speed lines, motion blur, papa with hair, papa not bald, eva with brown hair, eva with red hair, eva brunette, sara in ponytail, sara with straight hair, morphing, flickering, disfigured, distorted, extra face, unstable motion, papa standing still, papa motionless, papa idle, papa observing without acting, papa waiting passively, joe visible, joe in this clip, ginger visible, ginger in this clip, second dog, eva running, sara running, isabel running, kids hugging too tight, dutch angle, handheld shake, whip pan, jump cut
cameraStyle: slow dolly push to medium, one cut to medium-close on Isabel, slow pan right to Isabel-mom in background, capped by a slow pull back
closingFrame: Cottage approach medium-wide at @ep15_house4_isabel_cottage — @Sara center-left at the foot of the porch step with candy bucket in left hand and wand in right; @Eva center-right beside her with both hands on pumpkin bucket; @Isabel softly on porch step holding unicorn-shaped bucket; Isabel-mom softly in background with flashlight raised in a small gesture; warm twinkling string lights washing the porch.
